## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Datagrid client status and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/CRVh8fTPnewxyKZW2avFTS1B_mXK-EcF?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publishing Blocked:** Content publishing is on hold pending a client decision, which is tied to the new website deployment.](https://fathom.video/share/CRVh8fTPnewxyKZW2avFTS1B_mXK-EcF?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [**Client Unresponsive:** Datagrid is unresponsive on two key items: the publishing decision and signing the contract.](https://fathom.video/share/CRVh8fTPnewxyKZW2avFTS1B_mXK-EcF?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [**New Sync Scheduled:** A follow-up sync is set for Monday to resolve these blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/CRVh8fTPnewxyKZW2avFTS1B_mXK-EcF?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [**Internal Progress:** Vivek completed work for the RAPID and Galileo projects, unblocking the Galileo publishing ticket.](https://fathom.video/share/CRVh8fTPnewxyKZW2avFTS1B_mXK-EcF?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)

## Topics

### Client Unresponsiveness

  - [Datagrid is unresponsive on two key items, creating project blockers:](https://fathom.video/share/CRVh8fTPnewxyKZW2avFTS1B_mXK-EcF?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
      - [**Content Publishing:** A decision is needed to proceed.](https://fathom.video/share/CRVh8fTPnewxyKZW2avFTS1B_mXK-EcF?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
          - [**Context:** Publishing was paused per Tiago's request during the new website deployment.](https://fathom.video/share/CRVh8fTPnewxyKZW2avFTS1B_mXK-EcF?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
          - [**Risk:** The lack of a decision could lead to questions from the client in 4 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/CRVh8fTPnewxyKZW2avFTS1B_mXK-EcF?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
      - [**Contract Signing:** Multiple pings from Mara and Vivek have gone unanswered.](https://fathom.video/share/CRVh8fTPnewxyKZW2avFTS1B_mXK-EcF?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

### Resolution & Internal Progress

  - [A new sync was scheduled for Monday after Caitlin responded to a ping in the external channel.](https://fathom.video/share/CRVh8fTPnewxyKZW2avFTS1B_mXK-EcF?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [**Vivek's Progress:**](https://fathom.video/share/CRVh8fTPnewxyKZW2avFTS1B_mXK-EcF?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
      - [**Completed:** RAPID & Galileo project work.](https://fathom.video/share/CRVh8fTPnewxyKZW2avFTS1B_mXK-EcF?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
      - [**Pending:** Minor Strapi cleanup.](https://fathom.video/share/CRVh8fTPnewxyKZW2avFTS1B_mXK-EcF?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [**Blocked:** Galileo publishing ticket (pending client decision).](https://fathom.video/share/CRVh8fTPnewxyKZW2avFTS1B_mXK-EcF?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
